message:
perf(bench): Expand benchmark suite with comprehensive coverage

Add benchmarks for color parsing (named, hex, rgb, indexed), cell_len
(ASCII, CJK, emoji, mixed), style rendering (simple, complex, with links),
table rendering (3x3, 10x5), and panel rendering.

Uses std::hint::black_box instead of deprecated criterion::black_box.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
